entries.summary: Phase 5 Scouting Backend — implemented percentile computation, quality/value scoring, archetype score pre-computation, and Tauri commands for scouting data access. Added transfer_value column to season_players schema with migration support.

metadata.plan_id: FM ValueScout — CSV Parser & Scouting View

top_rejection_reasons: Incorrect normalization formula in quality score computation (5.2)
Dead code: migrate_db not wired into init (5.4)
lessons_learned: Always normalize sub-scores independently before applying proportional weights — reviewer caught incorrect 75/25 split normalization in compute_quality_score
Schema migrations must be wired into init_database immediately — migrate_db() was defined but never called, causing potential runtime failures on existing databases
Borrow checker: wrap all prepared statements in a block before tx.commit() to avoid E0505 errors
When adding columns to existing tables, update ALL test files that validate schema completeness (bidirectional column checks)
run_scouting_pipeline should be called after CSV import or exposed as a command — otherwise scouting queries return empty data
